sprint.name: Forge Expansion Sprint
sprint.note: A scheduled review is not a guaranteed release. The forge publishes at most one coherent change when it clears the quality and safety gates; otherwise it skips the window.
sprint.secondaryAutomation: A separate GitHub Actions workflow runs Tuesday and Friday at 15:17 UTC. It can only create or improve approved declarative-engine apps and records accepted publishes in this ledger.

method.label: Inspect
method.description: Review the live site, repository, current apps, open feedback, bugs, depth, accessibility, and portfolio gaps.

method.label: Compare
method.description: Consider at least three candidate changes and choose the one that creates the strongest useful depth or breadth.

method.label: Build one
method.description: Create or improve one coherent feature or app, including mobile, keyboard, touch, reduced-motion, teardown, and edge cases.

method.label: Validate
method.description: Run JavaScript syntax checks, feedback-routing tests, registry rules, required-file checks, and safety-boundary validation.

method.label: Publish or skip
method.description: Merge and deploy only after every required check passes. Skip when the candidate is weak, unsafe, duplicative, or incomplete.

qualityGates: One coherent change maximum per review window
No secrets, trackers, accounts, hidden storage, or unreviewed network behavior
No direct execution of user feedback
Mobile, keyboard, touch, focus, and reduced-motion behavior considered
Repository validation must pass before main is published

queue.title: Argument Architect rhetoric-and-audience balance playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on claim-evidence-response sequencing, audience-priority readability, objection variety, credibility and time pressure, support targets, keyboard assignment, narrow-screen card density, source-check unlock pacing, and whether advisor recovery restores options without erasing score and credibility consequences.

queue.title: Trackline Ranger inference-and-route balance playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on clue readability, weather decay, hidden-route fairness, camera placement, movement and energy costs, route-prediction precision, narrow-screen grid use, keyboard selection, thermal-camera unlock pacing, and whether ranger assist restores options without erasing score and trust consequences.

queue.title: Collection Navigator discovery and mobile playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on search relevance, newest and alphabetical ordering, category-filter interaction, late-loading app cards, session history usefulness, surprise selection fairness, narrow-screen control stacking, focus visibility, reduced-motion feedback, and whether the visible count remains accurate as autonomous app scripts register.

queue.title: Harbor Pilot traffic-and-docking balance playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on wind and current readability, traffic collision fairness, throttle and rudder differentiation, berth approach clarity, exclusion-zone penalties, fuel and hull pressure, narrow-screen helm controls, keyboard operation, bow-thruster unlock pacing, and whether tug recovery restores options without erasing score and trust consequences.

queue.title: Glassline Studio heat-and-shape balance playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on heat-decay readability, spin and blow differentiation, wall-thickness fairness, color stress tradeoffs, action-budget pressure, keyboard tool selection, narrow-screen controls, aurora unlock pacing, and whether fresh-glass recovery restores options without erasing score and trust consequences.

queue.title: Scent Cartographer formulation-balance playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on note-family readability, top-heart-base differentiation, volatility and aging clarity, budget pressure, formula-limit fairness, keyboard note selection, narrow-screen note density, orris-fixative unlock pacing, and whether master-perfumer rescue restores options without erasing score and trust consequences.

queue.title: Stratosphere Scout atmospheric-strategy balance playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on wind-layer readability, altitude-control costs, payload differentiation, sampling-window clarity, battery and ballast pressure, landing-target fairness, narrow-screen controls, keyboard operation, ozone-cell unlock pacing, and whether the recovery drone restores options without erasing score and trust consequences.

queue.title: Fold Lab geometric-engineering balance playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on crease-selection clarity, mountain and valley mode differentiation, symmetry and stress feedback, paper-grain fairness, action economy, narrow-screen controls, keyboard shortcuts, kite-reverse unlock pacing, and whether the fresh-sheet recovery restores options without erasing precision consequences.

queue.title: Mediation Table negotiation-strategy balance playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on hidden-priority clarity, issue-allocation controls, caucus and reframe tradeoffs, support and durability feedback, rising pressure fairness, narrow-screen issue density, keyboard operation, reciprocal-clause unlock pacing, and whether the senior-mediator reset restores options without erasing trust consequences.

queue.title: Graft Garden botanical-strategy balance playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on rootstock and scion compatibility clarity, cut differentiation, cambium and binding controls, disease-risk fairness, delayed healing feedback, stock and time pressure, narrow-screen option density, keyboard range behavior, bridge-interstem unlock pacing, and whether nursery reserve restores options without erasing trust consequences.

queue.title: Cut Room editing-strategy balance playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on footage-bin clarity, drag and keyboard reordering, continuity penalties, pace and emotion differentiation, music and transition tradeoffs, runtime pressure, narrow-screen timeline behavior, held-silence unlock pacing, and whether pickup recovery restores options without erasing trust consequences.

queue.title: Snowpack Lab alpine-risk balance playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on slope-selection clarity, snow-layer readability, test-cost differentiation, confidence feedback, weather-shift fairness, hazard-rating calibration, route-risk tradeoffs, narrow-screen controls, keyboard slope navigation, adaptive-route unlock pacing, and whether helicopter resupply enables recovery without erasing credibility consequences.

recentDecisions.title: Argument Architect 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Compared a structured argumentation game, a restoration-conservation workshop, and an adaptive ambient-audio experience. Prioritized Argument Architect because claim-evidence-response sequencing, audience priorities, shifting objections, credibility, time, support, progression, failure, recovery, and a session source-check unlock add an underserved rhetorical-strategy loop without device permissions, storage, or new network behavior.
checks: Audience, objection, time and credibility tradeoffs
Source-check unlock and one-use advisor recovery
Reduced motion, teardown and safety wiring

recentDecisions.title: Trackline Ranger 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Compared a wildlife-tracking field lab, a debate-structure simulator, and a restoration-conservation workshop. Prioritized Trackline Ranger because hidden animal movement, decaying spatial clues, camera placement, route prediction, energy pressure, progression, failure, recovery, and a session unlock add an underserved ecological-inference strategy loop without storage or new network behavior.
checks: Camera, energy, evidence and prediction tradeoffs
Thermal unlock and one-use ranger assist
Reduced motion, teardown and safety wiring

recentDecisions.title: Collection Navigator 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Compared a collection-wide discovery navigator, a wildlife-tracking field lab, and a debate-structure simulator. Prioritized the navigator because the rapidly growing gallery had outgrown category-only browsing; live search, ordering, visible counts, session history, and surprise selection create more immediate value across every existing experience without storage or new network behavior.
checks: No storage, permissions or network additions

recentDecisions.title: Harbor Pilot 1.1.0
recentDecisions.summary: Compared a harbor-pilot maneuvering game, a debate-structure simulator, and a wildlife-tracking field lab. Prioritized the existing unpublished Harbor Pilot because continuous vessel motion, wind and current drift, moving traffic, throttle and rudder control, fuel, hull, trust, progression, failure, recovery, and a session bow-thruster unlock add an underserved real-time navigation strategy loop while converting valid dormant work into a coherent release.
checks: Throttle, hull, fuel and trust tradeoffs
Bow-thruster unlock and one-use tug recovery
Reduced motion, teardown and safety wiring

recentDecisions.title: Glassline Studio 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Compared a glassblowing studio, a harbor-pilot maneuvering game, and a debate-structure simulator. Prioritized Glassline Studio because heat decay, rotation, blowing, shaping, wall thickness, color stress, action economy, annealing, progression, failure, recovery, and a session unlock add an underserved real-time material-control strategy loop.
checks: Heat, shape, wall and stress accounting
Reduced motion, teardown and safety wiring
